RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0022 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Liam Nguyen Date of Birth: 28/03/1984 SSN (tokenized): TKN-992401 Annual Income: $71,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $24,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Berlin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN40167AL Tesla Elantra 2024 ICE CPO 27,000 Authorized Signature: Liam Nguyen
